untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic support/resistance level tracking and pullback retest detection with volume comparison thresholds. These require multi-bar pattern recognition (identifying breakout bar, pullback bar, retest bar, and comparing volumes across them) which cannot be expressed as simple point-in-time indicator comparisons. Parameters like [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] for retest_proximity_pct, volume_ratio_threshold, confirmation_bars_required, and lookback_period_bars are unspecified and require calibration. The core logic of 'initial breakout → pullback retest → hold on second test' needs state tracking across multiple bars.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using Donchian channels as support/resistance proxies and volume ratios, but this does not capture the nuanced pullback-retest-confirmation pattern described in the signal. A proper implementation would require multi-bar pattern detection logic beyond single-condition evaluation.
